name: @starling/agent-wallet
description: Make a trading bot's wallets in one command for the Starling MCP. `init` generates all three wallets (Polygon, Hyperliquid, Solana), writes mcp.json + a plain-English WALLETS file, and needs no prompts or password. Keys never leave your box.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/keystore/crypto.test.js dist/keystore/vectors.test.js
scripts.doctor: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-wallet.js doctor
